name: File FTC consumer complaint
summary: Draft and route a complaint to the FTC's reportfraud.ftc.gov intake.

evidence.claim: The FTC operates reportfraud.ftc.gov as its primary consumer-complaint intake for deceptive business practices.

body.description: Draft a complaint with the user's details, the offending business, the alleged violation, and the supporting evidence Lens captured (screenshots, URLs, timestamps). User submits via reportfraud.ftc.gov (E1).

prerequisites.description: Lens has captured evidence of the alleged violation (screenshot, URL, timestamp).
User has provided name and email (FTC requires for intake).

fields.description: On {date}, I {interaction_summary}. The business engaged in {alleged_violation} as evidenced by the attached {evidence_type}. The applicable regulation is {regulation_citation}. I request FTC investigation.
